calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Vacated

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission And Requests For Production Of Documents, And To Compel Document Production
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gregory Rougeau, Esq. of Brunetti Rougeau LLP 415-992-8957 for Defendant FOREST GRAY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. Defendant reports responses have been received, making the motion moot and therefore withdraws their motion.

The Court vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FOREST GRAY's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests For Admission And Requests For Production Of Documents, And To Compel Document Production is off-calendar as moot. Defendant withdraws his motion.

Judge Pro Tem: Dianne Peebles, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/JPT/HK)
